mapper.insert: insert into deep_research_findings ( finding_id, run_id, task_id, fact_key, subject, predicate, value_text, value_type, unit, qualifier, claim_text, support_level, confidence, anchor_ids_json ) values ( #{record.findingId}, #{record.runId}, #{record.taskId}, #{record.factKey}, #{record.subject}, #{record.predicate}, #{record.valueText}, #{record.valueType}, #{record.unit}, #{record.qualifier}, #{record.claimText}, #{record.supportLevel}, #{record.confidence}, #{record.anchorIdsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} )
